arts.ttl: ‘Desperate…’: What Millwall boss was told as power cut prompts Portsmouth postponement
arts.sum: Neil Harris is adamant all the key figures wanted his side’s clash with Pompey to go ahead.

arts.ttl: Championship roundup: Leeds return to top, Portsmouth game hit by power cut
arts.sum: Leeds 3-0 Luton, Middlesbrough 0-1 Blackburn Pompey v Millwall postponed after lights go out Leeds United moved back to the top of the Championship with a comfortable 3-0 victory over Luton Town at Elland Road. Sam Byram gave the home side an early lead when he reacted quickest to volley into the far corner after seeing his initial shot blocked. Joel Piroe made it 2-0 from close range in first-half injury-time after Pascal Struijk’s header from a corner was parried by Thomas Kaminski. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'A dreadful call to make': Portsmouth chief explains why Millwall clash had to be abandoned
arts.sum: Andy Cullen rued making the ‘dreadful call’ to abandon Pompey’s match with Millwall - but insists it was essential for supporter safety.

arts.ttl: Southampton troll fierce rivals Portsmouth as game called off due to power failure
arts.sum: Portsmouth were forced to call off their Championship fixture with Millwall due to a power failure at Fratton Park - and they were subsequently mocked by their arch-rivals on social media

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Portsmouth clash with Millwall postponed after power cut
arts.sum: Pompey’s clash with Millwall has tonight been postponed after a power cut minutes before kick-off.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth’s home clash with Millwall postponed after power cut
arts.sum: Fratton Park was plunged into darkness 11 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick-off.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Power cut at Fratton throws Portsmouth clash with Millwall into doubt
arts.sum: A power cut at Fratton Park has thrown Pompey’s clash with Millwall into doubt.

arts.ttl: Fresh Portsmouth injury hands Blues favourite with emotional return to John Mousinho's starting XI against Millwall
arts.sum: Colby Bishop has been handed his first Pompey start of the season for tonight’s visit of Millwall.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Millwall: build-up, team news and live commentary from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good evening from Fratton Park for tonight’s clash under the lights with Millwall.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth V Millwall: Pompey fans warned to expect disruption with diversions for fans in place
arts.sum: Pompey fans are being warned to brace themselves for some disruption this evening with diversions in place for fans leaving Fratton Park as well as train issues.
